approvalSource: Steve approved continuing the Foundation gold-capture and capability sprint card-by-card without losing the gold from the long planning conversation.
notes: Approved to generate live System Capabilities from existing Foundation truth. Do not approve provider/tool runtime use, agent runtime, external writes, source mutation, private local content copying, or Value Builder split.
approvedChanges: Add reusable PILLAR-4 System Capabilities generator module.
Generate JSON and Markdown capability artifacts from live source, route, job, runtime, provider/tool, and agent registry truth.
Add focused proof and closeout wiring for PILLAR-4.
Advance Current Sprint to PILLAR-5-AGENT-INVENTORY-001 after closeout.
notNext: No provider calls, model/media generation, paid spend, terminal worker launch, or live extraction.
No live agent runtime, external write/send, Drive permission mutation, credential mutation, provider config change, public exposure, or source-system mutation.
No secret values, raw private local memory, MEMORY.md, USER.md, raw chat database, token, or private runtime-state content in generated artifacts.
No agent inventory detail; that is PILLAR-5.
